statement: The long-chain structural gap is CLOSED: the 2-pool root (free per-congener f_xy + enhanced active carrier; promoted to src/pfas_rice_two_pool.py) reproduces the C10-C12 root+straw+grain BAFs at log10 RMSE < 0.15, which the single-pool core could not (refit_oryza hit ceilings ~4-6x under).
